children.text: Documenting the days of District past
We are currently rebuilding our site. This section in particular requires some work to add additional content and photos, to existing and new articles.  Please revisit for new content.
If you have any content you would like to share, please send to:
mail@obpsfa.com

mainImage.caption: 2003-2004 squad

seo.description: Photos and stories of the District.

children.text: Breakfast. Match against St Pauls Under 12’s 2-2 draw. Lunch. Shopping and beach. We won’t say what we did on the beach!

seo.description: Breakfast. Match against St Pauls Under 12’s 2-2 draw. Lunch. Shopping and beach. We won’t say what we did on the beach!

children.text: Today was marvellous,at the start of the day we had breakfast and like always it was lovely.After our delicious breakfast we went to our match at the F.B playing fields.Today the blues went up against St Albans and the reds went up against Barking and Dagenham.The blues didnt get off to the greatest of starts but of course we never gave up and in the second half we got our reward.For our first equaliser the keeper made a good save and Teddy was there for the rebound.Teddy hit a amazing strike to make it 1-1 from 15 yards.15 minutes later out of pure unluckyness,Archie scored a great goal,an OWN GOAL!With only a few seconds left Mark played a great through ball right into the path of Will who took his chance and put it into the back of the net.St Albans took the kick-off and that was the game.

After the game,we went to the sea and climed lots of rocks and we saw some of the German bunkers from World War 2.On the way back to the minibus Mark had a big fall and fell into a pool of water and got absolutely soaked.When we got back to the hotel the blues went into the hotel swimming pool and had lots of fun.When we got back into our rooms we got changed into our suits and went down for our dinner.The dinner was definately top class.

seo.description: Today was marvellous,at the start of the day we had breakfast and like always it was lovely.After our delicious breakfast we went to our match at the F.B playing fields.

children.text: TODAY WAS AMAZING! For starters I banged in a long shot goal and completely destroyed the opponent’s dreams. We won our first game 3-1 the opposition got really mad also as soon as we had finished we went to the hotel swimming pool , we had a huge amount of fun, everyone had an excellent time soon after we got told by Mike that our surprise was we had to go play at a stadium that was where we met the opponents which were a decent side but we were too good for them. In the end we won 8-3 everybody who played gave 100% effort as soon as we had finished I felt tired and exuasted we went back to the hotel and all got dressed.
YOUR SINCERELY THE ONE AND ONLY ALFIE MURPHY! Boy

At the start of the day we had a full English breakfast which was amazing , after that we were on our way to the game . When the match started we knew that it wouldn’t be a challenging game , Alfie scored two and Sonny scored one. The other team were so mad because they knew that they were going to lose . After that, we went TO THE SWIMMING POOL!!!!! Everyone had loads of fun at the pool because we played bulldog , soon after we had to get dressed and went to our second game and won 8-3 after that everyone was exhausted and every one went to bed
A CHAP A FISTY ONE
YOURS SINCERELY CARLO DACOSTA

seo.description: TODAY WAS AMAZING! For starters I banged in a long shot goal and completely destroyed the opponent’s dreams.

children.text: After a long morning, we joyfully strolled though the mind-blowing Jersey zoo, which had eye-eye, that you go in a mysterious room that is pitch black and spot them in the dark. The reason we went in the dark is because the animals are nocturnal, so we wouldn’t want to disturb them. Lastly, the fruit bats were really really entertaining by pooing on there own food bowl.

Saving the best till last, the game against Potters Bar was full of character. Entering the pitch, we began sloppy as passes were going wrong and communication was nowhere to be found. After a blink of an eye, 1-0 to the opponents, then we began to play probably as it was 1-1. However, before we knew it; it was 1-1 at half time .

After a few minutes, Potters Bar were on the counter attack immediately and with a few threatening attacks Potters bar scored a fantastic goal followed by 2 more which lead us trailing 4-1 with 8 minutes to go and the team still kept hope and carried on attacking. With 2 perfect crosses by Jonny (Editor: Sonny?), Joe scored 2 fantastic headers. In the last 30 seconds Alex won a penalty which lead the Potters Bar mangers furious. Alfie despatched the ball bottom left corner with the last kick of the game which the final score 4-4.

seo.description: After a long morning, we joyfully strolled though the mind-blowing Jersey zoo, which had eye-eye, that you go in a mysterious room that is pitch black and spot them in the dark.

children.text: On Tuesday morning the blue squad knew they had a tough game ahead of them nevertheless they got into the minibus and made their way to the pitches . Once we had kicked off not many chances were ended successfully however challenges were made and we were playing well.At the start of the second-half orpington had a few chances.. played in by some of our central midfielders.The boys played well for a solid 10 minutes after a chance was put away by a Plymouth player the boys heads dropped

Slightly after a few minutes of good play from both teams are Plymouth player scored for them were now giving up in the head. But orpington carried on battling until the end of last minute chance for the blues came to nothing and the game had finished we knew we had let ourselves down
Aqua park

After the game all we wanted to do was to do something fun so we did we walked to Aqua splash when we arrived the boys got changed and ran into the pool with smiles on their facesWe all went off into different some to the flumes and some to the diving board plus many more areas of fun after an hour or so of fun a few of the boys went over to Steve who was half asleep we woke him and told him

That some of the boys wanted to get changed and get out the boys that want you to do so got changed and waited for the others when everybody was out the boys will lead back to the hotel and got changed for a lovely meal of roast duck.
Written by Toby Waller 50%
Jack Lee 50%
Will coats 0% fast asleep
